report.name: PENPRN_DEC_INSTANCE1_NPDD2

dataSource.name: Q_1
dataSource.select: SELECT COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_DOMAIN_TYPE, COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_NAME, PEN_PRODUCTS.PROCUCT_DESCRIPTION, PEN_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_CODE, COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION.PENSION_IKA_INST_NAME, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PROTOCOL_NO||'-'||TO_CHAR( PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.APPL_DATE,'DD/MM/RRRR'), PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PROTOCOL_NO, REG_INSURED.INSURED_ID, DECODE(REG_INSURED.SEX, 'Α', 'του ασφαλισμένου', 'Θ', 'της ασφαλισμένης'), REG_INSURED.SURNAME||' '||REG_INSURED.NAME, REG_INSURED.FATHER_NAME, REG_INSURED.MOTHER_NAME FROM REG_INSURED, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES, COM_ORG_BRANCHES, PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST, PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS, PEN_PRODUCTS, COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION WHERE PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO=:P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE=:P_APPL_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_DOCUMENT_TYPE_APPL_CODE='00001' AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR=:P_APPL_YEAR AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND REG_INSURED.INSURED_ID=PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.INSURED_ID AND PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST.QC_PER_PRODINST_CODE=:P_QC_PER_PRODINST AND PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST.PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTION_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTION_CODE AND COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION.PENSION_IKA_INST_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.INSTITUTION_CODE AND PEN_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.PRODUCT_CODE AND COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_CODE=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE;

dataItem.name: DECODE_REG_INSURED_SEX_Α_του_α
dataItem.defaultLabel: Decode Reg Insured Sex Α Του Α

dataSource.name: Q_4
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE, COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_DESCR, MIN(TO_DATE(1||'/'||nvl(MONTH,12)||'/'||nvl(YEAR,4000))), MAX(TO_DATE(30||'/'||nvl(MONTH,1)||'/'||nvl(YEAR,1000))), SUM(PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_QUAL_FINAL) FROM PEN_INSURED_DAYS , COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES WHERE PEN_INSURED_DAYS.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.USE_FLG='1' AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CATEGORY='2' AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE=COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_TYPE GROUP BY PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE,COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_DESCR;

dataItem.name: MAX_TO_DATE_30_nvl_MONTH_1_nv2
dataItem.defaultLabel: Max To Date 30 Nvl Month 1 Nv2

dataDescriptor.expression: MAX ( TO_DATE ( 30 || '/' || nvl ( MONTH , 1 ) || '/' || nvl ( YEAR , 1000 ) ) )

dataItem.name: MIN_TO_DATE_1_nvl_MONTH_12_nv3
dataItem.defaultLabel: Min To Date 1 Nvl Month 12 Nv3

dataDescriptor.expression: MIN ( TO_DATE ( 1 || '/' || nvl ( MONTH , 12 ) || '/' || nvl ( YEAR , 4000 ) ) )

dataSource.name: Q_5
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE, PEN_RULES.CONDITION, PEN_QUERY_TYPES.CONCERN_DAYS_FLG FROM PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE, PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE, PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE, PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM, PEN_RULES, PEN_QUERY_TYPES, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS, PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS WHERE PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DECISION_YEAR=:P_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE='1' AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DECISION_YEAR_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE_CODE=PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.BEPD_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE_CODE AND PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QSUB_QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS.TYPE='0' AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE = PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_RULES.RULE_CODE = PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM.RULE_RULE_CODE AND PEN_RULES.QUERY_TYPE_CODE = PEN_QUERY_TYPES.QUERY_TYPE_CODE AND PEN_QUERY_TYPES.CONCERN_DAYS_FLG = 2

dataSource.name: Q_6
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE, PEN_RULES.CONDITION, PEN_QUERY_TYPES.CONCERN_DAYS_FLG FROM PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE, PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE, PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE, PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM, PEN_RULES, PEN_QUERY_TYPES, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS, PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS WHERE PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DECISION_YEAR=:P_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE='1' AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DECISION_YEAR_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE_CODE=PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.BEPD_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE_CODE AND PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QSUB_QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS.TYPE='0' AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE = PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_RULES.RULE_CODE = PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM.RULE_RULE_CODE AND PEN_RULES.QUERY_TYPE_CODE = PEN_QUERY_TYPES.QUERY_TYPE_CODE AND PEN_QUERY_TYPES.CONCERN_DAYS_FLG = 1

dataSource.name: Q_7
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INS_INSURED_ID_INDIRECT, PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE, REG_INSURED.SURNAME||' '||REG_INSURED.NAME, REG_INSURED.DATE_OF_BIRTH, PEN_DEPENDANT_TYPES.DEPENDENCY_NAME FROM REG_INSURED, PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS,PEN_DEPENDANT_TYPES WHERE PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR= :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.DECISION_YEAR_SR=:p_dt_decision_year AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR='1' AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INS_INSURED_ID_DIRECT=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INS_INSURED_ID_INDIRECT=REG_INSURED.INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE!='00001' AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE=PEN_DEPENDANT_TYPES.DEPENDENCY_TYPE ORDER BY PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE

dataSource.name: Q_8
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.TXT_DESCR, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE,PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QUAL_TERM_CODE AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR= :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=:p_dt_decision_year AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.CHOOCE_FLG='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.RULE_OR_QUAL_FLG='0' ORDER BY PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE

dataSource.name: Q_9
dataSource.select: SELECT ' ' AMOUNT_DESCR, 1 AMOUNT, ' ' SUM_INDICATOR, ' ' CALCULATION_FLG FROM DUAL;

dataSource.name: Q_10
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.TXT_DESCR, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE,PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QUAL_TERM_CODE AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=:P_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.CHOOCE_FLG='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.RULE_OR_QUAL_FLG='1' ORDER BY PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE

dataSource.name: Q_17
dataSource.select: SELECT value FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code IN ('00070', '00071') AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00116'

dataSource.name: Q_20
dataSource.select: SELECT com_pension_institutions.pension_inst_name FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance, com_pension_institutions WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00070' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00010' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=com_pension_institutions.PENSION_INST_CODE(+)

dataSource.name: Q_24
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_DEATH_REASON.REASON_DESCR FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance, PEN_DEATH_REASON WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00035' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00049' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=PEN_DEATH_REASON.REASON_CODE(+)

dataSource.name: Q_26
dataSource.select: SELECT value FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00028' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00013'

dataSource.name: Q_27
dataSource.select: SELECT value FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00028' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00014'

dataSource.name: Q_28
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_ACCOUNT.QUAL_PENSION_RIGHT_DATE, PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.PAYMENT_END_DATE, PEN_PRODUCTS.PROCUCT_DESCRIPTION, DECODE (PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.DEDUCT_FLG, NULL, 'ΠΛΗΡΗ', 'ΜΕΙΩΜΕΝΗ'), PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT, PEN_PRODUCTS, PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS, PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST, PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QCPRODINS_QC_PER_PRODINST_CODE=PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST.QC_PER_PRODINST_CODE AND PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST.PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTION_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTION_CODE AND PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.PRODUCT_CODE=PEN_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_CODE AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID= PEN_ACCOUNT.INS_INSURED_ID AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR=PEN_ACCOUNT.DI_DT_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=PEN_ACCOUNT.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DECISION_YEAR_SR=PEN_ACCOUNT.DI_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR=PEN_ACCOUNT.DI_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO;

dataSource.name: Q_29
dataSource.select: SELECT ' ' INSURANCE_FROM, ' ' INSURANCE_TO, 1 INSURANCE_DAYS, --1 INSURANCE_NPDD_YEARS, --1 INSURANCE_NPDD_MONTHS, --1 INSURANCE_NPDD_DAYS, ' ' TRANS_DESCR, ' ' DESCRIPTION, ' ' DESCRIPTION2 FROM DUAL;

dataSource.name: Q_30
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_ACCOUNT.QUAL_PENSION_RIGHT_DATE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO2

dataSource.name: Q_31
dataSource.select: SELECT TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.TXT_DESCR, TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT, TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE,PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QUAL_TERM_CODE AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR= :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=:p_dt_decision_year AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR='1' AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.CHOOCE_FLG='1' AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.RULE_OR_QUAL_FLG='0' ORDER BY TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE

dataSource.name: Q_32
dataSource.select: SELECT TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.TXT_DESCR, TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT, TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QUAL_TERM_CODE AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=:P_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR='1' AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.CHOOCE_FLG='1' AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.RULE_OR_QUAL_FLG='1' ORDER BY TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE

dataSource.name: Q_33
dataSource.select: SELECT ' 'SPRE_CODE, ' 'SPRE_DESCR, 1 INSURANCE_DAYS_SPRE_FINAL FROM DUAL;

dataSource.name: Q_34
dataSource.select: SELECT SUM(PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CALC_FINAL) S_INS_DAYS_CALC_FINAL, MIN(TO_DATE(1||'/'||nvl(MONTH,12)||'/'||nvl(YEAR,4000))), LAST_DAY(MAX(TO_DATE(1||'/'||NVL(MONTH,1)||'/'||NVL(YEAR,1000)))) FROM PEN_INSURED_DAYS WHERE PEN_INSURED_DAYS.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO= :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INS_INSURED_ID= :P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.USE_FLG='1' AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CALC_FINAL IS NOT NULL AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CALC_FINAL!=0;

dataItem.name: MIN_TO_DATE_1_nvl_MONTH_12_nv6
dataItem.defaultLabel: Min To Date 1 Nvl Month 12 Nv6

dataDescriptor.expression: MIN ( TO_DATE ( 1 || '/' || nvl ( MONTH , 12 ) || '/' || nvl ( YEAR , 4000 ) ) )

dataItem.name: LAST_DAY_MAX_TO_DATE_1_NVL_MO1
dataItem.defaultLabel: Last Day Max To Date 1 Nvl Mo1

dataDescriptor.expression: LAST_DAY ( MAX ( TO_DATE ( 1 || '/' || NVL ( MONTH , 1 ) || '/' || NVL ( YEAR , 1000 ) ) ) )

dataSource.name: Q_35
dataSource.select: SELECT ' ' HEAVY_PERIOD_DESCR, 1 HEAVY_DAYS_PER_PERIOD FROM DUAL;

dataSource.name: Q_36
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_DEATH_REASON.REASON_DESCR FROM TMP_dec_fact_types_instance, PEN_DEATH_REASON WHERE TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00035' AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00049' AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=PEN_DEATH_REASON.REASON_CODE(+) AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.FORM_ID=:P_FORM_ID

dataSource.name: Q_2

dataSource.select:
/*SELECT PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS.PERCENTAGE FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance, PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00159' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00228' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS.SICKNESS_DEDUCTION_ID(+);*/
SELECT PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.PERCENTAGE FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance, PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code in ('00069','00159') AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00228' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.SICKNESS_DEDUCTION_ID(+) AND :P_ACC_START_DATE >=PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.EFFECTIVE_DATE ORDER BY PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.EFFECTIVE_DATE DESC;

SELECT PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.PERCENTAGE FROM TMP_dec_fact_types_instance, PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW WHERE TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00159' AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00228' AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.FORM_ID=:P_FORM_ID AND TMP_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.SICKNESS_DEDUCTION_ID(+) AND :P_ACC_START_DATE >=PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.EFFECTIVE_DATE ORDER BY PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.EFFECTIVE_DATE DESC;

dataSource.name: Q_65
dataSource.select: SELECT X.*, SUM(DECODE(X.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE1, '00003', 1, 0)) OVER () COUNT123 FROM ( SELECT C.NAME || ' ' || C.SURNAME TOTAL_NAME, C.SEX DEP_SEX, C.DATE_OF_BIRTH DEP_BIRTH, D.DEPENDENCY_NAME DEPENDENCY_NAME1, C.INSURED_ID INSURED_ID1, E.END_DATE, A.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE1 FROM PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS A, PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE B, REG_INSURED C, PEN_DEPENDANT_TYPES D, PEN_QT_PER_BE_CC_PER_ACCOUNT E WHERE A.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR= B.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR AND A.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= B.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND A.DECISION_YEAR_SR = B.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR AND A.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = B.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR AND C.INSURED_ID = A.INS_INSURED_ID_INDIRECT AND A.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE!= '00001' AND D.DEPENDENCY_TYPE=A.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE AND B.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :P_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND B.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR =:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND B.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND A.INS_INSURED_ID_INDIRECT = E.INS_INSURED_ID(+) AND A.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR = E.DI_DT_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE(+) AND A.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR =E.DI_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE(+) AND A.DECISION_YEAR_SR =E.DI_DT_DECISION_YEAR(+) AND A.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = E.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO (+) AND E.CC_PER_BE_TYPE_PER_DECINS_UPD ='1' AND E.STATUS ='1' union SELECT C.NAME || ' ' || C.SURNAME TOTAL_NAME, C.SEX DEP_SEX, C.BIRTH_DATE DEP_BIRTH, D.DEPENDENCY_NAME, C.ASSIGNEE_ID, E.END_DATE, A.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE FROM PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS A, PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE B, pen_assignee_members C, PEN_DEPENDANT_TYPES D, PEN_QT_PER_BE_CC_PER_ACCOUNT E WHERE A.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR= B.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR AND A.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= B.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND A.DECISION_YEAR_SR = B.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR AND A.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = B.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR AND C.assignee_ID = A.INS_INSURED_ID_INDIRECT AND A.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE!='00001' AND D.DEPENDENCY_TYPE=A.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE AND B.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :P_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND B.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND B.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND A.INS_INSURED_ID_INDIRECT = E.INS_INSURED_ID(+) AND A.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR = E.DI_DT_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE(+) AND A.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR =E.DI_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE(+) AND A.DECISION_YEAR_SR =E.DI_DT_DECISION_YEAR(+) AND A.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = E.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO (+) AND E.CC_PER_BE_TYPE_PER_DECINS_UPD ='1' AND E.STATUS ='1' ) X

dataSource.name: Q_64
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_ACCOUNT.NUMBER_OF_DAYS , PEN_ACCOUNT.SECURED_AMOUNT_FOR_REIN FROM REG_INSURED, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES, COM_ORG_BRANCHES, PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST, PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS, PEN_PRODUCTS, COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION, PEN_ACCOUNT WHERE PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO=:P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE=:P_APPL_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_DOCUMENT_TYPE_APPL_CODE='00001' AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR=:P_APPL_YEAR AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND REG_INSURED.INSURED_ID=PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.INSURED_ID AND PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST.QC_PER_PRODINST_CODE=:P_QC_PER_PRODINST AND PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST.PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTION_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTION_CODE AND COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION.PENSION_IKA_INST_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.INSTITUTION_CODE AND PEN_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.PRODUCT_CODE AND COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_CODE=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO= :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO;

dataSource.name: Q_66
dataSource.select: SELECT A.VALUE, A.DEC_FACT_TYPE_CODE FROM PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE A WHERE A.title_code='00368' AND A.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND A.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND A.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND A.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND A.dec_fact_type_code IN ('00510','00511','00512','00513','00514') ORDER BY A.DEC_FACT_TYPE_CODE

dataSource.name: Q_67
dataSource.select: SELECT THOUSANDS_2007, BASIC_AMOUNT_2007, YEAR_BENEFIT_AMOUNT, PLACE_AMOUNT, special_basic_amount_2007, spec_categ_year_ben_prcn_2007, spec_bonus_2007, THOUSANDS_2008, THOUS_A_35, THOUS_A_50, AVEG_SALARY, TOTAL_AMOUNT_2007, TOTAL_AMOUNT_2008, YEAR_BENEFIT_AMOUNT_2008, PLACE_AMOUNT_2008, prcn_thous_2008 FROM PEN_ACCOUNT_DTL_INFORM WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO;

textSegment.string: ΣΤΟΙΧΕΙΑ ΠΡΟΣΔΙΟΡΙΣΜΟΥ ΠΡΟΣΩΠΙΚΟΥ ΚΑΙ ΑΜΕΤΑΒΙΒΑΣΤΟΥ ΕΠΙΔΟΜΑΤΟΣ ΑΝΙΚΑΝΟΤΗΤΑΣ
ΥΠΟΛΟΓΙΣΜΟΣ ΓΙΑ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΙΜΗ ΥΠΗΡΕΣΙΑ ΜΕΤΑ ΤΗΝ 1/1/2008
Το παραπάνω ποσό σύνταξης που υπολογίζεται κατά την αποχώρηση από την υπηρεσία, διαμορφώνεται
κατά την έναρξη της σύνταξης σε
ΤΡΟΠΟΠΟΙΟΥΜΕ ΤΗ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΙΟΔΟΤΙΚΗ ΠΡΑΞΗ ΓΙΑ ΤΟΥΣ ΛΟΓΟΥΣ ΠΟΥ ΑΝΑΦΕΡΟΝΤΑΙ ΣΤΟ ΣΚΕΠΤΙΚΟ.
Με τέσσερα(4) αντίγραφα της απόφασης και ένα αποδεικτικό επίδοσης, για την επίδοση τριών
αντιγράφων στον δικαιούχο και την επιστροφή του αποδεικτικού επίδοσης συμπληρωμένου και
ΣΗΜΕΙΩΣΗ: Κατά της πράξης κανονισμού τησ σύνταξης μπορούν να ασκηθούν:
α) Αίτηση θεραπείας σε προθεσμία 60 ημερών από την παραλαβή της.
β) Έφεση στο ΙΙ τμήμα του Ελεγκτικού Συνεδρίου σε προθεσμία 60 ημερών από την παραλαβή της.
Τα στοιχεία του φακέλου από τα οποία προκύπτουν τα ακόλουθα:
και του Α.Ν. 1854/1951 όπως τροποποιήθηκαν και συμπληρώθηκαν, Ν. 3029/2002

function M_4FormatTrigger return boolean is begin
-- Automatically Generated from Report Builder. if :P_PRODINST = '15' AND (:MEDICAL_DISABILITY!=0 OR :PENSION_DISABILITY!=0 OR :DISABILITY_START_DATE!=0 OR :DISABILITY_END_DATE!=0 OR :SUM_INS_DAYS_QUAL_FINAL!=0) THEN return (TRUE); ELSE return (FALSE); END IF; end;
